domain: Hagia Sophia pendentive vault (4 spherical-triangle pendentives at corners transition circular-dome load to 4 square-base piers; resolves geometric incompatibility square↔circle while concentrating load)
specific_mechanism: Geometric-domain transition via 4 corner pendentives constrained to a single sphere; load concentrated to 4 anchor piers.
llm_application: PGDBA: 4 spherical-triangle adapters between LLM components with incompatible geometries; each adapter resolves a corner; load concentrated to 4 pier-coordinates (anchor tokens/neurons); constant-curvature constraint prevents flat-projection collapse.
novelty_claim: Geometry-Preserving Composition (2410.09908), Scaling-Aware Geometry Grounding (2602.02780), GNSP (2507.19839) cover related projection/composition. None retrieve 4-corner pendentive-shaped adapters + pier-anchor concentration + constant-curvature constraint triad.
